THEWICKEN-NIBBLE.title: Nibble
THEWICKEN-NIBBLE.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Rat[/gold] card played this combat.
THEWICKEN-CONSUME_YOUTH.title: Consume Youth
THEWICKEN-CONSUME_YOUTH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Deals double damage to enemies above half HP.
THEWICKEN-HEXBLAST.title: Hexblast
THEWICKEN-HEXBLAST.description: Apply {HexPower:diff()} [gold]Hex[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each unique debuff on the enemy.
THEWICKEN-CURSED_SPELLBOOK.title: Cursed Spellbook
THEWICKEN-CURSED_SPELLBOOK.description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 fewer card and gain {Energy:diff()} extra [gold]Energy[/gold].
THEWICKEN-RIP_VEINS.title: Rip Veins
THEWICKEN-RIP_VEINS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL characters.
THEWICKEN-REFUSE_PILE.title: Refuse Pile
THEWICKEN-REFUSE_PILE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Add {Cards} [gold]Rats[/gold] to both your draw and discard piles.
THEWICKEN-GRIND_DOWN.title: Grind Down
THEWICKEN-GRIND_DOWN.description: Exhaust a card to create a [gold]Potion[/gold]. Its type sets the potion's effect, its rarity its potency.
THEWICKEN-FEAST_WITH_WOLVES.title: Feast With Wolves
THEWICKEN-FEAST_WITH_WOLVES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw until you draw an [gold]Attack[/gold] card.
THEWICKEN-CONCOCT.title: Concoct
THEWICKEN-BREW.title: Brew
THEWICKEN-EXTRACT_ESSENCE.title: Extract Essence
THEWICKEN-EXTRACT_ESSENCE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. On unblocked damage, extract a [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWICKEN-STRIKE_WICKEN.title: Strike
THEWICKEN-DEFEND_WICKEN.title: Defend
THEWICKEN-OWL_FAMILIAR.description: Summon an [gold]Owl Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Wisdom+|Wisdom}[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-OWL_FAMILIAR.title: Owl Familiar
THEWICKEN-WISDOM.title: Wisdom
THEWICKEN-SPINES.title: Spines
THEWICKEN-BUSH.title: Bush
THEWICKEN-STONE_SKIN.title: Skin of Stone
THEWICKEN-CAT_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Cat Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Ferocity+|Ferocity}[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-CAT_FAMILIAR.title: Cat Familiar
THEWICKEN-FEROCITY.title: Ferocity
THEWICKEN-FERTILIZE.title: Fertilize
THEWICKEN-FERTILIZE.description: Gain {BramblesPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold]. Upgrade {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your hand.
THEWICKEN-LAVENDER_AND_SAGE.title: Lavender and Sage
THEWICKEN-NETTLES.title: Nettles
THEWICKEN-NETTLES.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Bramble[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BRAMBLEBURST.title: Brambleburst
THEWICKEN-BRAMBLEBURST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Bramble[/gold], then lose all [gold]Brambles[/gold].
THEWICKEN-WILD_GROWTH.title: Wild Growth
THEWICKEN-FORBIDDEN_MAGIC.title: Forbidden Magic
THEWICKEN-STUCK_IN_THE_BUSH.title: Stuck in the Bush
THEWICKEN-MOONDROP_TEA.title: Moondrop Tea
THEWICKEN-SOMETHING_WICKED.title: Something Wicked
THEWICKEN-TOIL_AND_TROUBLE.title: Toil and Trouble
THEWICKEN-RATTLING_BOTTLES.title: Rattling Bottles
THEWICKEN-RATTLING_BOTTLES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Fill your empty potion slots with [gold]Rocks[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BAG_OF_TEETH.title: Bag of Teeth
THEWICKEN-HIDDEN_IN_SMOKE.title: Hidden in Smoke
THEWICKEN-BRAMBLE_SHIELD.title: Bramble Shield
THEWICKEN-VICIOUS_BARBS.title: Vicious Barbs
THEWICKEN-VICIOUS_BARBS.description: Discard your hand. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and gain {BramblesPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold] for each card discarded.
THEWICKEN-HEDGE_PRISON.title: Hedge Prison
THEWICKEN-ROTTING_ROOTS.title: Rotting Roots
THEWICKEN-ROTTING_ROOTS.description: Gain {Weak:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold]. An enemy loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
THEWICKEN-BIND_IN_BLOOD.title: Bind in Blood
THEWICKEN-BIND_IN_BLOOD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add {Cards} [gold]Wound[/gold] to your discard pile. Apply {HexPower:diff()} [gold]Hex[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BOTTOMLESS_CAULDRON.title: Bottomless Cauldron
THEWICKEN-BOTTOMLESS_CAULDRON.descriptio: Whenever you use a potion, create a [gold]Wicked Brew[/gold].
THEWICKEN-CLOAK_OF_MOONLIGHT.title: Cloak of Moonlight
THEWICKEN-CLOAK_OF_MOONLIGHT.description: Whenever you create a card or potion, gain {CloakOfMoonlightPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BOTTLE_WALL.title: Bottle Wall
THEWICKEN-HERBAL_REMEDY.title: Herbal Remedy
THEWICKEN-HERBAL_REMEDY.description: Destroy all of your potions. Draw {Cards:diff()} and gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each.
THEWICKEN-UNSTABLE_REACTION.title: Unstable Reaction
THEWICKEN-UNSTABLE_REACTION.description: Destroy all of your potions. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each.
THEWICKEN-DANCE_AROUND_THE_CAULDRON.desc: Whenever you play a [gold]Skill[/gold] this turn, make a [gold]Wicked Brew[/gold].
THEWICKEN-ROOMY_SATCHEL.title: Roomy Satchel
THEWICKEN-ROOMY_SATCHEL.description: Gain {Slots:diff()} potion slots until the end of combat.
THEWICKEN-PLAGUE.title: Plague
THEWICKEN-QUILLS.title: Quills
THEWICKEN-BRISTLE.title: Bristle
THEWICKEN-CURIOSITY.title: Curiosity
THEWICKEN-CURIOSITY.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Put a card from your hand on top of your draw pile.
THEWICKEN-CURIOSITY.selectionScreenPromp: Put a card on top of your draw pile
THEWICKEN-KNOWLEDGE.title: Knowledge
THEWICKEN-KNOWLEDGE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Upgrade ALL cards in your hand for the rest of combat.|Upgrade a card in your hand for the rest of combat.}
THEWICKEN-WORMY.title: Wormy
THEWICKEN-HIBERNATE.title: Hibernate
THEWICKEN-MUTILATE.title: Mutilate
THEWICKEN-SCOUT_WEAKNESS.title: Scout Weakness
THEWICKEN-CLAW_EYES.title: Claw Eyes
THEWICKEN-SHINY.title: Shiny!
THEWICKEN-LAZE.title: Laze
THEWICKEN-RATS.title: Rats
THEWICKEN-RAT_FAMILIAR.title: Rat Familiar
THEWICKEN-RAT_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Rat Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Plague+|Plague}[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-PORCUPINE_FAMILIAR.title: Porcupine Familiar
THEWICKEN-PORCUPINE_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Porcupine Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Quills+|Quills}[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-BEAR_FAMILIAR.title: Bear Familiar
THEWICKEN-BEAR_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Bear Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Hibernate+|Hibernate}[/gold] or [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Mutilate+|Mutilate}[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-CROW_FAMILIAR.title: Crow Familiar
THEWICKEN-CROW_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Crow Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Scout Weakness+|Scout Weakness}[/gold], [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Claw Eyes+|Claw Eyes}[/gold], or [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Shiny!+|Shiny!}[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-SLOTH_FAMILIAR.title: Sloth Familiar
THEWICKEN-SLOTH_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Sloth Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Laze+|Laze}[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-POCKET_RATS.title: Pocket Rats
THEWICKEN-BROOM_STRIKE.title: Broom Strike
THEWICKEN-BROOM_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. The next [gold]Power[/gold] you play this turn costs 0.
THEWICKEN-CHROMATIC_CLAWS.title: Chromatic Claws
THEWICKEN-CHROMATIC_CLAWS.description: Deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage for each potion in your belt.
THEWICKEN-EXTRACT_LIFE.title: Extract Life
THEWICKEN-EXTRACT_LIFE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. A random card in your hand gains [gold]Replay[/gold] {Replay:diff()} and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
THEWICKEN-INTERNAL_CHANT.title: Internal Chant
THEWICKEN-INTERNAL_CHANT.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to the number of debuffs on all characters.
THEWICKEN-PILLAGE.title: Pillage
THEWICKEN-PILLAGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw a card for each of your [gold]Familiars[/gold].
THEWICKEN-STAMPEDE.title: Stampede
THEWICKEN-STAMPEDE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each of your  [gold]Familiars[/gold].
THEWICKEN-RITUAL_SACRIFICE.title: Ritual Sacrifice
THEWICKEN-GNASH.title: Gnash
THEWICKEN-GNASH.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Gnash[/gold] played this combat.
THEWICKEN-WOLF_FAMILIAR.title: Wolf Familiar
THEWICKEN-WOLF_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Wolf Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Gnash+|Gnash}[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-CACKLE.title: Cackle
THEWICKEN-WEATHERED_WITCH_HAT.title: Weathered Witch Hat
THEWICKEN-WEATHERED_WITCH_HAT.descriptio: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. The next [gold]Skill[/gold] you play costs 1.
THEWICKEN-WOE_AND_WHIMSY.title: Woe and Whimsy
THEWICKEN-WOE_AND_WHIMSY.description: Add {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Familiar[/gold] cards to your hand.{IfUpgraded:show: They are [gold]Upgraded[/gold].|}
THEWICKEN-CHIMERA_FAMILIAR.title: Chimera Familiar
THEWICKEN-CHIMERA_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Chimera Familiar[/gold]. You draw 1 fewer card each turn, but at the start of your turn add 2 random [gold]Familiar[/gold] cards to your hand.{IfUpgraded:show: They are [gold]Upgraded[/gold].|}
THEWICKEN-FIND_FAMILIAR.title: Find Familiar
THEWICKEN-FIND_FAMILIAR.description: Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Familiar[/gold] {Cards:plural:power|powers} from your draw or discard pile to your hand.
THEWICKEN-PACT_OF_BEASTS.title: Pact of Beasts
THEWICKEN-PACT_OF_BEASTS.description: Put all [gold]Familiar[/gold] powers from your draw and discard piles into your hand.
THEWICKEN-EMBRACE_THE_WILDS.title: Embrace the Wilds
THEWICKEN-EMBRACE_THE_WILDS.description: Summon {Familiars:diff()} random [gold]Familiars[/gold]. Draw {DrawReduction} fewer cards at the start of each turn.
THEWICKEN-CIRCLE_OF_ROT.title: Circle of Rot
THEWICKEN-CIRCLE_OF_ROT.description: You and your allies gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold]. Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEWICKEN-CREEPING_VINES.title: Creeping Vines
THEWICKEN-SHARE_THE_BREW.title: Share the Brew
THEWICKEN-SHARE_THE_BREW.description: You and your allies each gain a random [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BOTTLE_BARRAGE.title: Bottle Barrage
THEWICKEN-BOTTLE_BARRAGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Potion[/gold] created this combat.
THEWICKEN-GATHER_HERBS.title: Gather Herbs
THEWICKEN-DOUBLE_DOUBLE.title: Double, Double
THEWICKEN-DOUBLE_DOUBLE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. The next time you use a [gold]Potion[/gold], create a copy of it.
THEWICKEN-AMBUSH.title: Ambush!
THEWICKEN-AMBUSH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Summon a random [gold]Familiar[/gold].
THEWICKEN-A_LITTLE_SIP.title: A Little Sip
THEWICKEN-A_LITTLE_SIP.description: Whenever you use a [gold]Potion[/gold], heal {ALittleSipPower:diff()} HP.
THEWICKEN-PACT_OF_AGONY.title: Pact of Agony
THEWICKEN-PACT_OF_AGONY.description: Lose {HpLoss:diff()} life. Add {Cards} [gold]Wound[/gold] to your discard pile. ALL enemies gain {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
THEWICKEN-PACT_OF_FURY.title: Pact of Fury
THEWICKEN-FAVORITE_SPELLBOOK.title: Favorite Spellbook
THEWICKEN-FAVORITE_SPELLBOOK.description:
Gain {BramblesPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Create a [gold]Wicked Brew[/gold].
THEWICKEN-LIGHT_THE_CANDLE.title: Light the Candle
THEWICKEN-LIGHT_THE_CANDLE.description: Upgrade {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your hand. Create a [gold]Vial of Smoke[/gold].
THEWICKEN-WITCHCRAFT.title: Witchcraft
THEWICKEN-CURSED_BOTTLES.title: Cursed Bottles
THEWICKEN-VEXING_THWACK.title: Vexing Thwack
THEWICKEN-BEWITCHING_GRIN.title: Bewitching Grin
THEWICKEN-SOUL_KNOT.title: Soul Knot
THEWICKEN-SOUL_KNOT.description: Whenever you are attacked, even to Block, ALL enemies take that much damage.
THEWICKEN-BROKEN_PACT.title: Broken Pact
THEWICKEN-PRICES_PAID.title: Prices Paid
THEWICKEN-PRICES_PAID.description: Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Create a [gold]Slicing Brew[/gold].
